creator: chuanwei.foo@hotmail.com
text:
Some FreeBSD RSS feeds are using the YYYY-MM-DD format for their <pubDate> elements. <pubDate> is supposed to be in the format specified in RFC 822. My RSS feed reader (Liferea) ignores the <pubDate> element for some FreeBSD RSS feeds because the date format is wrong.

This issue affects the following feeds:
* https://www.freebsd.org/news/feed.xml
* https://www.freebsd.org/press/feed.xml
* https://www.freebsd.org/security/feed.xml

References:
* https://www.rssboard.org/rss-specification
* https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc822#section-5.1
